arts.ttl: Icon believes Liverpool man is on course for national team stardom – Arne Slot magic helps him fulfil his promise
arts.sum: Ryan Gravenberch is on course to become the Netherlands most important player, thanks to the work Arne Slot has done with him at Liverpool. That’s according to Dutch icon Ruud Gullit, who has sung the midfielder’s praises to De Telegraaf in his column for the paper today. arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister pleads with Liverpool over Salah, Alexander-Arnold & Van Dijk contracts
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister has urged the club to reach agreements over contract extensions with star trio Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold. Hopefully they can come to an agreement because we want him and Virgil and Trent to continue with us.

arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Newcastle – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool will look to continue their title charge when the Reds take on Newcastle United on Wednesday night. Arne Slot’s side head to St James’ Park with a nine-point lead in the Premier League title race, having beaten reigning champions Manchester City at Anfield at the weekend. arts.ttl: I faced Premier League in PSR battles and know truth about 'unsustainable' Newcastle United myth
arts.sum: There is 'nothing unsustainable' about how Newcastle United are run and the club's owners should be allowed to invest 'a bit more'. That is the view of Nick De Marco, the barrister who represented Newcastle in the Magpies' takeover dispute, before acting for Leicester City and Nottingham Forest a few years later when these clubs were hit with PSR charges by the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool made me feel wanted – but it would have been a dream to play for Arsenal
arts.sum: Ryan Babel has admitted that while he was made to feel comfortable at Liverpool by Rafa Benitez, his teammates and the fans, a move to Arsenal was always a dream which never came to fruition
